keyResults: Minimal state space: |Σ| >= 2 (discrete) or dim Σ >= 1 (continuous)
Continuous minimal: Σ ≅ S¹, uniform rotation, G_O = U(1)
Exactly one conserved charge (rank-1 Lie group)
Q_O = C(Σ) identification (definitional bridge, forced by uniqueness)
Minimality theorem: U(1) ⊆ G_O for all observers; G_O = U(1) → unique S¹ oscillator (up to frequency)
Physical identification with fundamental particle (interpretive, deferred)
